notes: Seasonal New American, progressive small-to-large plates (First / Second / Dessert) plus a $130 four-course chef's tasting option (premium wine pairing +$90; veg/pescatarian available). First mapped to appetizer (Little Gem -> salad), Second to entree, plus desserts. Cocktail/wine-by-glass list not on the menu page; beverages empty.

dishes.name: Lark House Made Bread Service
dishes.description: Smoked farro bread, pão de queijo, malt pecan scones, chive blossom butter.

dishes.name: Little Gem Lettuce
dishes.description: Green goddess dressing, watermelon radish, Garrotxa goat cheese.

dishes.name: Hamachi Crudo
dishes.description: Lemongrass, cilantro, serrano chili, fish sauce, fried shallots.

dishes.name: Mussels
dishes.description: Chistorra sausage, green garlic, chickpeas, vermouth, grilled bread.

dishes.name: Asparagus
dishes.description: Pecorino espuma, cured egg yolk, puffed farro, mizuna.

dishes.name: Shigoku Oysters
dishes.description: Fermented hot pepper sauce, lemon.

dishes.name: Creole Fricassée
dishes.description: Veal sweetbreads, artichoke, Andouille sausage, peppers.

dishes.name: Duck Liver Mousse
dishes.description: Pickled rhubarb, caraway rye, crème fraîche, cherry mostarda.

dishes.name: Dungeness Crab Bomba Rice
dishes.description: Leeks, tempura garlic scapes, piri piri.

dishes.name: Tagliatelle Carbonara
dishes.description: Morel mushrooms, pancetta, egg yolk, Reggiano Parmigiano.

dishes.name: Gnochetti Sardi

dishes.name: Wild Salmon
dishes.description: Yuzu kosho glaze, purple daikon, shiso, dashi pickled hon-shimejis.

dishes.name: Wagyu Bavette Steak

dishes.name: Baba au Rhum

dishes.name: Dark Chocolate Budino

dishes.name: Huckleberry Rhubarb Shortcake
dishes.description: Buttery biscuit, vanilla mascarpone, aged balsamic.

dishes.name: Three Great Cheeses

dishes.name: Raspberry Sorbet
